REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF SHELBY YAMIN, JAMES PANNELL'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT DEBBIE ODIYE'S PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS MOOT, RESPONSES PROVIDED ON NOVEMBER 7, 2016. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,510 TO BE PAID WITHIN 5 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. DEFENDANT PROVIDES NO ARGUMENT OR EVIDENCE IN OPPOSITION JUSTIFYING FAILURE TO TIMELY RESPOND TO DISCOVERY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)
